summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Statements (Estados de Cuenta) feature. All backend API endpoints working correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: Facturas page loads with tabs 'Facturas' and 'Statements', statement creation dialog functional with manual selection and client filter modes, existing statement displays correctly (STMT-2026-0001).

issues: Service Worker causes page reloads on first visit - console shows 'New service worker found, installing...' followed by reload. This is expected PWA behavior but can cause blank screens temporarily.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/statements - returns list of statements
Backend: POST /api/statements - creates new statement from invoice_ids
Backend: GET /api/statements/{statement_id} - retrieves single statement
Backend: DELETE /api/statements/{statement_id} - deletes statement
Backend: POST /api/statements/preview - returns preview without saving
Backend: GET /api/statements/clients/summary - returns unique clients with invoice counts
Backend: Returns 404 for non-existent statement
Backend: Returns 400 for empty invoice_ids
Backend: Returns 404 for invalid invoice_ids
Frontend: Invoices page loads with 'Facturas' and 'Statements' tabs
Frontend: Statements tab shows existing statements list
Frontend: Statement card displays: number, client, date, invoice count, total facturado, total pagado, balance
Frontend: PDF download button available on statements
Frontend: Delete button available on statements
Frontend: 'Crear Statement' button opens dialog
Frontend: Dialog has 'Selección Manual' and 'Filtrar por Cliente' modes
Frontend: Dialog shows date range filters (Fecha Desde/Hasta)
Frontend: Dialog shows invoice list with checkboxes
Frontend: Dialog shows 'Seleccionar Todas' option
Frontend: Dialog has Notes field
Frontend: Dialog has Cancelar, Vista Previa, and Crear Statement buttons
seed_data_creation: Test statements created during testing are cleaned up automatically. Existing statement STMT-2026-0001 for Janssen-Ortho LLC preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Statements feature fully tested. All CRUD operations work. Login: j.carrero@ohsmspr.com / Admin2024!. Existing statement: STMT-2026-0001 for Janssen-Ortho LLC with 2 invoices, Total Facturado: $2,338.01, Total Pagado: $686.30, Balance: $1,651.71.

features_verified.statements_tab: ✓ Visible as second tab in Invoices page
features_verified.statements_list: ✓ Shows existing statements with all relevant data
features_verified.create_statement_dialog: ✓ Opens with filter modes, date range, invoice list, notes field
features_verified.invoice_selection: ✓ Checkboxes for individual invoices + select all
